productDisplayName: Puma Men Jive Navy Blue Slippers
description: A perfect gift for your feet on those casual days, this slipper from puma is crafted from soft and durable material to offer exemplary comfort. With a sporty print across the footbed, this slipper looks great with all casual wear.   Upper Printed synthetic leather with a toe separator PU footbed for cushioned comfort Print across the footbed for style   Outsole Suction grooves throughout the durable rubber outsole for absolute grip even on smooth surfaces Outsole curved at the forefoot for enhanced protection to the toes   Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
